hero.title: Supporting You Through Every Step of Your Journey
hero.description: We provide free of charge palliative care and support for families across Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire & Lincolnshire.

careServices.title: Care and Comfort When You Need It Most
careServices.intro: From specialist nursing to emotional support, we provide free, compassionate care for individuals and families within our local community.

cards.title: Day Care
cards.description: Expert nursing support and symptom management in a social 'home-from-home' environment.

cards.title: Wellbeing Sessions
cards.description: Holistic support for individuals and carers.

cards.title: Social-sitting
cards.description: Vital respite for unpaid carers. Our fully-trained volunteers provide companionship for your loved one at home.

cards.title: Counselling & emotional support
cards.description: Compassionate support for individuals, families and carers through every stage of your journey.

videoFeature.title: Watch our short video to see the difference we make for local families
